benefits.description: Injecting near elbow allows healing; forced reduced use of elbow due to injection site pain.

side_effects.description: Pain for several days after injecting directly near inner elbow bone, about 1 cm above and inward from elbow bone.

protocol_notes: Taught by functional doctor. Injects directly near elbow (1 cm above and inward from inner elbow bone) twice a week using insulin needle straight in. Also does subq elsewhere. Pain at injection site considered beneficial as it forces rest of the elbow.
